Motion For Withdrawal Of Attorney Of Record


Off Calendar Oct-04-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom:
Neusha Ghaedi, Esq., 415-555-5555, appearing for Liberty Properties Group, Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Hearing is held. Ms. Ghaedi stated that she already submitted a proposed order. The Court stated that this motion was uncontested.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Motion For Withdrawal Of Attorney Of Record is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order for the same is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF, LIBERTY PROPERTIES GROUP LLC'S ATTORNEY MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD

Transferred to Department 501 to be heard at 9:30 AM on the same date. That department handles all breach of lease cases per San Francisco Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)

Motion For Withdrawal Of Attorney Of Record


Off Calendar Sep-20-2021 Continued To Oct-04-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Neusha Ghaedi, Esq. appearing via Zoom, appearing for Plaintiff Liberty Properties Group.
No other appearances.

Hearing held. The Court stated that it understood that a proof of service was filed on Friday and cited CCP 3.1300(c) that requires a proof of service to be filed 5 days in advance. Ms. Ghaedi argued that she thought the methods outlined in her declaration were sufficient, stated that this was her first time to file a motion to be relieved as counsel and requested a continuance.

The Court rules as follows: Motion For Withdrawal Of Attorney Of Record is continued to October 04, 2021 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 501. Plaintiff to provide notice. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)
